description:
Adds fixtures/ast_eval_env/ — extends ast_eval with `{:var, name}` and
`{:let, name, expr, body}` over a cons-list environment of `{name, value}`
tuples. Exercises:
- 5-arm multi-clause tuple-pattern dispatch
- tuple destructure inside cons-pattern head (`[{n, v} | rest]`)
- atom equality inside `if` for lookup-loop termination
- binding shadow across nested `let`s
- list-of-pair env construction via cons on every recursive call

All four paths green (jit, interp, aot, repl).

This fixture is the proving ground for the arc — it pushed the envelope just
enough to reveal `.29.11`/`.29.12.1` panics when extended toward HOFs +
non-tail recursion (quicksort attempt). The quicksort form lands in fz-aiz.5
as the keystone integration test.

Independent of the rest of the arc; lands first as a fast quick-fix.
title: fz-aiz.0: fixture ast_eval_env (let-bound AST evaluator)
